name: Iso11783OPChangeSize
title: Iso11783OPChangeSize
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeSize( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword width, dword height );
description: The function changes the size of an object. A Change Size command to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
